completePayout(bytes32,uint8,bytes32).details: Also reveals the details key if needed. Valid reports may use multiplier 0-10; invalid and spam reports must use multiplier 0. The treasury independently checks that `msg.sender` remains a treasury-authorized broker.

params.detailsKey: Details key to reveal, or zero only when the key was already revealed.
params.multiplier: Reward multiplier selected by the broker.
params.reportHash: Report hash at the current payout cursor.

params.initialAdmins: Admins initially authorized to flag report status.
params.initialBondVault: Bond vault used for voting weight snapshots.
params.initialBrokers: Brokers initially authorized to publish, reveal, and complete payouts.
params.initialOwner: Owner that can manage vaults, brokers, and admins.
params.initialTreasuryVault: Treasury vault used for reward payouts.

eip712Domain().details: returns the fields and values that describe the domain separator used by this contract for EIP-712 signature.

returns._0: Bond vote snapshot. Returns zero values for an address that has not voted.

params.limit: Maximum number of hashes to return.

returns._0: Next payout report hash, or zero if all reports are complete.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

publishBug((bytes32,string,address,uint6.details: `reporterSignature` must be an EIP-712 signature over `PublishBug` for this contract, chain, reporter, nonce, deadline, and `msg.sender` as broker. The signature binds the BugBundle hash and commitments; `bugBundleCid` is stored but not part of the signature because brokers pin after authorization.

params.deadline: Latest timestamp at which the signature is valid.
params.input: Bug metadata and commitments to store.
params.nonce: Reporter nonce consumed to prevent replay.

params.broker: Broker address authorized by this signature.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.reportHash: Report hash whose key is being revealed.

submitBondVote(bytes32,bool).details: Vote weight is snapshotted from the current bond vault level and does not change unless the voter submits another vote. Pending withdrawals reduce level before the snapshot.

params.support: True for upvote, false for downvote.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

JUDGMENT_PERIOD().notice: Minimum review/reveal period before details can be revealed or payout completed.

MAX_PAYOUT_MULTIPLIER().notice: Maximum reward multiplier a broker can choose for a valid bug.

admins(address).notice: Whether an address can flag report status.

bondVault().notice: Bond vault used to snapshot voter levels.

bondVoteCount(bytes32).notice: Returns number of distinct voters for a report.

bondVoteVoterAt(bytes32,uint256).notice: Returns a report voter by index.

brokers(address).notice: Whether an address can publish bugs, reveal details, and complete payouts.

completePayout(bytes32,uint8,bytes32).notice: Completes the next report payout in insertion order.

downVoteWeight(bytes32).notice: Total current downvote weight for a report.

exists(bytes32).notice: Whether a report hash exists in the index.

flagBug(bytes32,uint8).notice: Flags a report as valid, invalid, or spam.

getBondVote(bytes32,address).notice: Returns a voter's current stored vote snapshot for a report.

hasBondVote(bytes32,address).notice: Whether a voter has ever submitted a vote for a report.

latestReportHashes(uint256).notice: Returns the most recent report hashes in reverse insertion order.

nextPayoutIndex().notice: Index in `reportHashes` of the next report eligible for payout completion.

nextPayoutReportHash().notice: Returns the report hash currently expected for the next payout.

publishBug((bytes32,string,address,uint6.notice: Publishes a reporter-signed bug into the index.

publishBugDigest((bytes32,string,address.notice: Returns the EIP-712 digest a reporter must sign for `publishBug`.

reportCount().notice: Returns number of reports in insertion order.

reportHashAt(uint256).notice: Returns a report hash by insertion index.

revealDetailsKey(bytes32,bytes32).notice: Reveals a report's details key after the judgment period.

setBondVault(address).notice: Sets the bond vault used for future vote-weight snapshots.

setTreasuryVault(address).notice: Sets the treasury vault used for future payouts.

submitBondVote(bytes32,bool).notice: Submits or updates a bonded vote before reveal time.

treasuryVault().notice: Treasury vault used for ordered reward payouts.

upVoteWeight(bytes32).notice: Total current upvote weight for a report.

usedReporterNonces(address,uint256).notice: Reporter nonce replay protection for EIP-712 publish signatures.
